stemHtml: The approach flight idle value (RPM) is higher than the ground idle value…

options.a: to allow the engines to more rapidly accelerate to full power, in case of a go-around.
options.b: to guarantee that the engine provides go-around power on approaches with one engine inoperative.
options.c: to ensure that the engines provide sufficient power to maintain the glidepath in the landing configuration.
options.d: to guarantee that a gradient of 5% can be achieved during the descent.
